title: Identity/IAM Windows Domain Join
summary: Submit evidence for joining a Windows training client to the jlm.lab domain and validating domain connectivity.
mentor_prompts: Check DNS before attempting domain join.
Confirm the client is on the correct VLAN.
Verify the computer object after joining.
Document errors exactly if the join fails.
Do not include domain admin credentials.
safety_notes: Do not join real personal devices to the training domain.
